title: Crystal oscillator
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Crystal_Oscillator.jpg|thumb|Crystal oscillator from the Towani starcruiser.]]
[[File:Crystal_Oscillator_Design_Specs.jpg|thumb|Crystal oscillator design specs from [[Noa Briqualon's starship]].]]
A '''Crystal oscillator''' was a device that regulated power on some [[Starship/Legends|starships]]. One was used on the [[Towani family]]'s [[Towani family star cruiser|starcruiser]] when it crashed on [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. It was later stolen by [[Terak]], [[King/Legends|King]] of the [[Sanyassan Marauders]]. A similar device had been employed by [[Salak Weet]] and [[Noa Briqualon]] in their [[Noa Briqualon's starship|starship]] around [[26 BBY/Legends|26 BBY]]; that crystal had been shattered during the crash, stranding the two [[Scout/Legends|scouts]] on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Ring, the Witch, and the Crystal: An Ewok Adventure]]''
*''[[Ewoks: The Battle for Endor]]''
